popularStory.headline: Sir Henery FitzHugh
popularStory.description: 3rd Lord FitzHugh, Knight of the Order of the Garter. Knight of Ravensworth in Richmondshire, Yorkshire. In right of his wife, of Stanton St Quintin, Wiltshire, Luttin, Northampton. Chamberlain to Kin …

zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry FitzHugh於大約1358年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，他的父親Hugh FitzHugh22歲，母親Joan Scrope24歲。他於1385年與Lady Elizabeth Grey在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年1月11日在他的家鄉享年68歲，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry FitzHugh于大约1358年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，他的父亲Hugh FitzHugh22岁，母亲Joan Scrope24岁。他于1385年与Lady Elizabeth Grey在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年1月11日在他的家乡享年68岁，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry FitzHugh was born about 1358, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Hugh FitzHugh, was 22 and his mother, Joan Scrope, was 24. He married Lady Elizabeth Grey in 1385, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 January 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 68, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry FitzHugh est né environ 1358, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Hugh FitzHugh, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Scrope, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Grey en 1385, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry FitzHugh um 1358 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh FitzHugh 22 und seine Mutter Joan Scrope 24. Er hat 1385 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England Lady Elizabeth Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Januar 1425 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry FitzHugh è nato il circa 1358 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh FitzHugh, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Scrope, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Grey nel 1385, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 11 gennaio 1425, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.Jervaulx Abbey, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Revensworth, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry FitzHughが約1358年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Hugh FitzHughは22歳，母Joan Scropeは24歳であった。1385年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでLady Elizabeth Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年1月11日に故郷で68歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry FitzHugh(이)가 대략 1358년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh FitzHugh(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Scrope(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Lady Elizabeth Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 1월 11일 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry FitzHugh nasceu aproximadamente 1358, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh FitzHugh, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Scrope, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Grey em 1385, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1425, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry FitzHugh родился около 1358 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh FitzHugh было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Scrope, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Grey в 1385 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 января 1425 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry FitzHugh nació aproximadamente 1358, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh FitzHugh, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Scrope, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Grey en 1385, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de enero de 1425, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
